## Meeting Purpose

[Introduce GrowthX's services to Mandolin and explore potential collaboration for brand building and talent attraction.](https://fathom.video/share/xAyzLpNky-S9xS7Ex8xf3sSdx8oeUxXb?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Mandolin is preparing to announce Series A funding and aims to establish public presence for brand recognition and recruiting](https://fathom.video/share/xAyzLpNky-S9xS7Ex8xf3sSdx8oeUxXb?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Primary goals: Build brand for hiring engineers and create materials for customers/industry visibility](https://fathom.video/share/xAyzLpNky-S9xS7Ex8xf3sSdx8oeUxXb?tab=summary&timestamp=1224.0)
  - [GrowthX offers expert-led AI content creation workflows, tailored for both recruiting and customer-facing content](https://fathom.video/share/xAyzLpNky-S9xS7Ex8xf3sSdx8oeUxXb?tab=summary&timestamp=1567.0)
  - [Next steps: Mohammed to discuss internally with CEO Will, then schedule follow-up meeting with GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/xAyzLpNky-S9xS7Ex8xf3sSdx8oeUxXb?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)

## Topics

### Mandolin's Current Situation and Goals

  - [Recently raised Series A funding, announcement coming in next few weeks](https://fathom.video/share/xAyzLpNky-S9xS7Ex8xf3sSdx8oeUxXb?tab=summary&timestamp=97.0)
  - [Selling to infusion clinics, automating administrative workflows with AI](https://fathom.video/share/xAyzLpNky-S9xS7Ex8xf3sSdx8oeUxXb?tab=summary&timestamp=617.0)
  - [Experiencing rapid customer growth, need to scale hiring quickly](https://fathom.video/share/xAyzLpNky-S9xS7Ex8xf3sSdx8oeUxXb?tab=summary&timestamp=676.0)
  - [Aims to establish public presence after staying low-key, inspired by companies like Ramp](https://fathom.video/share/xAyzLpNky-S9xS7Ex8xf3sSdx8oeUxXb?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Two main goals:](https://fathom.video/share/xAyzLpNky-S9xS7Ex8xf3sSdx8oeUxXb?tab=summary&timestamp=553.0)
    1.  Brand building for hiring (primary focus)
    2.  Creating materials for customers and industry visibility

### GrowthX's Offering and Approach

  - [Editorial package: 7-8 articles/week, \~50,000 words](https://fathom.video/share/xAyzLpNky-S9xS7Ex8xf3sSdx8oeUxXb?tab=summary&timestamp=737.0)
  - [4-week calibration process with weekly team meetings](https://fathom.video/share/xAyzLpNky-S9xS7Ex8xf3sSdx8oeUxXb?tab=summary&timestamp=750.0)
  - [Uses AI tools + expert-led workflows for high-quality, scalable content creation](https://fathom.video/share/xAyzLpNky-S9xS7Ex8xf3sSdx8oeUxXb?tab=summary&timestamp=1576.0)
  - [Leverages job-to-be-done framework to identify key topics and keywords](https://fathom.video/share/xAyzLpNky-S9xS7Ex8xf3sSdx8oeUxXb?tab=summary&timestamp=1613.0)
  - [Can potentially adapt strategy for both customer acquisition and talent attraction](https://fathom.video/share/xAyzLpNky-S9xS7Ex8xf3sSdx8oeUxXb?tab=summary&timestamp=1567.0)
  - [Ability to start quickly (potentially within days) compared to building in-house team](https://fathom.video/share/xAyzLpNky-S9xS7Ex8xf3sSdx8oeUxXb?tab=summary&timestamp=1756.0)

### GrowthX's Experience and Results

  - [Grew from $3M to $7-8M revenue this year](https://fathom.video/share/xAyzLpNky-S9xS7Ex8xf3sSdx8oeUxXb?tab=summary&timestamp=1534.0)
  - [Scaled from 10 to 60+ employees rapidly](https://fathom.video/share/xAyzLpNky-S9xS7Ex8xf3sSdx8oeUxXb?tab=summary&timestamp=1546.0)
  - [Case studies show significant organic traffic growth (e.g., 24x) for clients](https://fathom.video/share/xAyzLpNky-S9xS7Ex8xf3sSdx8oeUxXb?tab=summary&timestamp=1504.0)
  - [Experience with technical content requiring expert review (e.g., medical, legal)](https://fathom.video/share/xAyzLpNky-S9xS7Ex8xf3sSdx8oeUxXb?tab=summary&timestamp=1652.0)

### Potential Collaboration Structure

  - [GrowthX to assign industry-experienced team members or source new experts if needed](https://fathom.video/share/xAyzLpNky-S9xS7Ex8xf3sSdx8oeUxXb?tab=summary&timestamp=1661.0)
  - [Close collaboration in initial weeks to understand Mandolin's direction](https://fathom.video/share/xAyzLpNky-S9xS7Ex8xf3sSdx8oeUxXb?tab=summary&timestamp=1667.0)
  - [Weekly adjustments and improvements based on performance](https://fathom.video/share/xAyzLpNky-S9xS7Ex8xf3sSdx8oeUxXb?tab=summary&timestamp=1672.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Mohammed to discuss internally with CEO Will](https://fathom.video/share/xAyzLpNky-S9xS7Ex8xf3sSdx8oeUxXb?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up meeting with GrowthX team, including Marcel (GrowthX founder)](https://fathom.video/share/xAyzLpNky-S9xS7Ex8xf3sSdx8oeUxXb?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
  - [GrowthX to prepare more in-depth examples relevant to Mandolin's use case](https://fathom.video/share/xAyzLpNky-S9xS7Ex8xf3sSdx8oeUxXb?tab=summary&timestamp=1734.0)
  - [Explore potential for immediate start if Mandolin decides to proceed](https://fathom.video/share/xAyzLpNky-S9xS7Ex8xf3sSdx8oeUxXb?tab=summary&timestamp=1756.0)
